title: Create Fabric: ComputerCraft
description: Fabric CC: Tweaked but with a design more fitting of the Create Mod
body:
### This resource pack redesigns CC:Tweaked to fit more stylistically with Create

Resource pack doubles as a datapack. If you are not using Global Packs mod then just copy the resource pack into your world's datapack folder.

![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19daa064baa6ee4fa991fd9c0ec71e1a55d93583.png)

You may use this in your modpack, as long as it properly links back to this project and provides downloads.
